title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious, and suggests humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans. The discussion covers his reasoning for this position and reflections on the capabilities of systems he helped develop.
